30.2. 8 - Facsimile Signatures 
(Rev. 10438, Issued: 11-06-20, Effective: 03-01-20, Implementation: 01- 11-21) 

The plan of care or oral order may be transmitted by facsimile machine. The HHA is not 
required to have the original signature on file. However, the HHA is responsible for 
obtaining original signatures if an issue surfaces that would require verification of an 
original signature.
